authority: real OPRA fills (C1) — only WR authority; no BS-sim, no LLM in sim loop
side: C (calls — double bottom is a bullish reversal; calls-only family)
strike_convention_verified: calls (side='C'): strike = atm + strike_offset => negative=ITM (strike below spot), positive=OTM (strike above spot). Verified simulator_real.py L357-364. anti-pattern 2.2 guarded: offset IS applied to strike.
honest_verdict: CANDIDATE EDGE FOUND: 4/20 strike/stop cells clear the full bar; best config = strike+0_stop-0.99 | tp1=0.3 runner=2.0 trail=None. Real OPRA fills (C1).

direction_split.note: Family is calls-only (double bottom = bullish reversal). Bear column is the SAME signals traded as PUTS to substantiate the documented bull-tilt (C3: bull loses less than bear on options). Bear is NOT a tradable config.

DISCLOSURE.per_trade: avg_pnl is per-trade EXPECTANCY, reported alongside (not instead of) WR (OP-14)
DISCLOSURE.concentration: top5_day_pct = top-5 winning DAYS as % of total P&L (OP-20 #5)
DISCLOSURE.positive_quarters: count of calendar quarters with positive total P&L, out of 6
DISCLOSURE.no_data: strike offsets outside the cached OPRA band return None -> counted as no_data, not silently dropped
DISCLOSURE.spy_vs_option: SPY-direction scan WR (proxy 59.5%) != option edge; this is the option-P&L test (C3/L58)
DISCLOSURE.survivor_guard: a lone positive cell that is tiny-N/high-concentration/OOS-negative is reported clears_bar=false, never cherry-picked (anti-pattern 2.10)
